flaw.name: CWE-476: NULL Pointer Dereference
flaw.evidence: /* FLAW: Using a single & in the if statement will cause both sides of the expression to be evaluated * thus causing a NPD */

fix.name: CWE-476: NULL Pointer Dereference
fix.evidence: /* FIX: Use && in the if statement so that if the left side of the expression fails then * the right side will not be evaluated */
